headlines.title: Locus Robotics launches Locus Array for fully autonomous fulfillment
headlines.summary: Locus Array is designed to complete fulfillment workflows without manual intervention and is already in use at DHL and other customers.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle autonomous, robot ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Pickle Robot to share lessons learned from taking robots out of the lab and into the field
headlines.summary: At the Robotics Summit, Pickle Robot's founder and CTO will break down the lessons it learned in making warehouse robots commercially viable.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, insansi robotlarin depo ve lojistik tarafinda gercek saha kullanimina gectigini gosteriyor.

headlines.title: Tesla to share roadmap for building AMRs at Robotics Summit & Expo
headlines.summary: Joshua Joseph, an AMR Deployment Engineer at Tesla, will present a roadmap for deploying AMRs in legacy manufacturing environments.

headlines.title: Transitive Robotics announces Transitive 2.0 open-source robotics framework
headlines.summary: Transitive 2.0 adds ClickHouse, Grafana, and Alertmanager, offering advanced storage and monitoring to help scale growing robot fleets.
